description: A manager needs to perform an audit to reconcile the list of finished vehicles in the system with the physical vehicles in the storage lot.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all vehicles currently listed as being in the 'Finished Goods - Lot G' status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of 500 VINs.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a team with handheld scanners to scan the VIN of every vehicle physically present in Lot G.

expected_outcome.value: A team is dispatched to perform the physical scan.

nodes.task_description: Compare the system list with the scanned list and flag any discrepancies (missing or extra vehicles).

expected_outcome.value: The comparison shows one vehicle is physically present but not in the system list, and one is in the system list but not physically present.
